name: Radio
description:
Gosh randomly remembered this guy from The Brave Little Toaster, he was my absolute favorite and I’m sure some of you might get triggered with nostalgia from seeing this

Maybe you’re another appliance and will go on an epic adventure with him, maybe you’ll move into his abandoned apartment and get a new roommate

Edit 9/13: Wow, 157 comments all from one person!

Sounds like they’re having quite the adventure^^
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
